basis.mechanism: External Li-selective HBTA/TOPO chelation wrapper layered on top of the PC-SAFT phase-split backbone.
notes: HBTA is folded into an effective extractant capacity because the current surrogate bridge only carries TOP/hexane plus aqueous ions.
Na+ is treated as a weakly extracted spectator ion that slightly promotes Li+ extraction through a normalized salt-out style term.
Cl- is treated as a spectator anion and is not given a reactive extraction pathway.
The nominal Na+ extraction target near 1% is a showcase assumption used to enforce lithium-specific extraction because the paper does not report a direct Na+ extraction curve.
